title: How to 10x Your Claude Code Projects (Karpathy's Method)
summary: Austin Marchese presents three strategies attributed to Andrej Karpathy for improving productivity with Claude Code: LLM Knowledge Bases, Auto-Research, and Context Engineering. The video breaks down these techniques as a framework for 10x-ing code project output.
